steps.title: Identify the starting time
steps.content: The initial deposit is the balance when the account was opened. Since $x$ is the number of months since the initial deposit, the starting time is $x=0$.

steps.title: Read the intercept
steps.content: At $x=0$, the graph shows the account balance at the start. The $y$-intercept is $10$, so the estimated initial deposit was $10$ dollars. The answer is 10.
